{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Pharmacist Assistant",
  "description": "At Troop Pharmaceuticals Limited, we are committed to shielding health and empowering lives. Our dedication to delivering quality pharmaceutical products and healthcare solutions drives us to maintain excellence and integrity in everything we do.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	A pharmacy assistant supports pharmacists by managing inventory, processing prescription orders, packaging medication, and providing customer service under supervision.
	They handle administrative tasks like filing, operating cash registers, and managing patient records, playing a key role in efficient pharmacy operation.


Core Responsibilities


	Dispensing Support:Receiving prescriptions, inputting patient information, and preparing medications for pharmacist verification.
	Customer Service:Greeting customers, answering phones, and releasing prepared prescriptions to patients.
	Inventory Control:Stocking shelves, monitoring inventory levels, and ordering new supplies.
	Administrative Tasks:Maintaining patient records, filing, and processing payments via cash registers.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Skills: Strong communication, attention to detail, and knowledge of, or ability to learn, pharmacy software systems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to:&nbsp;hr@troopharm.com&nbsp;using &quot;Pharmacist Assistant&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Pharmacist Assistant Job at Troop Pharmaceuticals Limited




        
    

        
        At Troop Pharmaceuticals Limited, we are committed to shielding health and empowering lives. Our dedication to delivering quality pharmaceutical products and healthcare solutions drives us to maintain excellence and integrity in everything we do.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A pharmacy assistant supports pharmacists by managing inventory, processing prescription orders, packaging medication, and providing customer service under supervision.
	They handle administrative tasks like filing, operating cash registers, and managing patient records, playing a key role in efficient pharmacy operation.


Core Responsibilities


	Dispensing Support:Receiving prescriptions, inputting patient information, and preparing medications for pharmacist verification.
	Customer Service:Greeting customers, answering phones, and releasing prepared prescriptions to patients.
	Inventory Control:Stocking shelves, monitoring inventory levels, and ordering new supplies.
	Administrative Tasks:Maintaining patient records, filing, and processing payments via cash registers.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Skills: Strong communication, attention to detail, and knowledge of, or ability to learn, pharmacy software systems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using "Pharmacist Assistant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Personnel",
  "description": "JV Management Consulting -&nbsp;We are passionate about supporting businesses across Africa in order to help businesses achieve sustainable growth . With a team of experts and a wealth of experience, we specialise in providing innovative management solutions that empower organisations to thrive in today&#39;s dynamic and ever-evolving business landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Personnel

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job description


	We are seeking a creative and proactive Social Media Personnel to manage and grow our online presence.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating engaging content, managing social media platforms, and supporting the brand&rsquo;s visibility and engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across social media platforms
	Manage daily social media activities including posts, comments, and messages
	Monitor social media trends and suggest content ideas
	Support the development of social media strategies
	Track engagement and provide basic performance reports
	Ensure consistent brand messaging across all platforms


Requirements


	Previous experience in a similar role is an advantage
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills
	Basic knowledge of social media tools and analytics
	Familiarity with design tools (e.g., Canva) is a plus
	Good communication and organizational skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;jvmcrecruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Application &ndash; Social Media Personnel&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Personnel Job at JV Management Consulting




        
    

        
        JV Management Consulting - We are passionate about supporting businesses across Africa in order to help businesses achieve sustainable growth . With a team of experts and a wealth of experience, we specialise in providing innovative management solutions that empower organisations to thrive in today's dynamic and ever-evolving business landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Personnel

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative and proactive Social Media Personnel to manage and grow our online presence.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating engaging content, managing social media platforms, and supporting the brand’s visibility and engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across social media platforms
	Manage daily social media activities including posts, comments, and messages
	Monitor social media trends and suggest content ideas
	Support the development of social media strategies
	Track engagement and provide basic performance reports
	Ensure consistent brand messaging across all platforms


Requirements


	Previous experience in a similar role is an advantage
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills
	Basic knowledge of social media tools and analytics
	Familiarity with design tools (e.g., Canva) is a plus
	Good communication and organizational skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Application – Social Media Personnel” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Site Office Assistant",
  "description": "Popville Luxury Homes is a fully integrated real estate development and management company headquartered in Abuja, delivering a new standard of intelligent luxury living. We create architecturally refined residences where advanced smart technology, timeless design, and uncompromising security converge. Inspired by the power, grace, and individuality of the world&rsquo;s most iconic horse breeds, our collections represent freedom, sophistication, and enduring value. Each Popville residence is thoughtfully engineered to enhance comfort, efficiency, and long-term investment performance. At Popville, we don&rsquo;t simply build homes&mdash;we develop future-ready assets designed for discerning homeowners and forward-thinking investors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Office Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Site Office Assistant at Popville Luxury Homes, you will ensure the site office is kept clean, organized, and running smoothly.
	You will assist staff and visitors with day-to-day tasks, making sure the site environment is safe, welcoming, and efficient. When required, you will also provide basic technical support under supervision. Your role directly supports Popville&#39;s operational excellence on project sites.


Key Responsibilities
Site Office Cleanliness and Readiness (Daily):


	Perform daily cleaning of the site office, reception/induction area, meeting container, restrooms, and kitchenette to ensure a consistently presentable and hygienic environment.
	Keep common areas tidy and ensure essential items (e.g., soap, paper towels, drinking water) are replenished.
	Empty trash bins and ensure all areas are thoroughly cleaned at the end of each workday.
	Report any facility or equipment issues promptly to the GM.


Reception and Communication Support:


	Welcome site visitors, vendors, and subcontractors, guiding them appropriately and ensuring they sign the site register.
	Take clear, accurate messages for staff and relay them promptly.
	Assist in posting and updating notices, memos, and site information boards as directed by the GM.


Site Supply Management:


	Monitor and maintain stock of office consumables (stationery, cleaning materials, refreshments) and report shortages to Admin support.
	Assist in receiving and organizing deliveries at the site office.
	Support in tracking PPE availability and distribution when required.


Document Handling &amp; Organization (Physical):


	Help distribute, file, and organize physical documents such as delivery notes, site registers, or attendance sheets.
	Facilitate photocopying/printing tasks using site office equipment.


Meeting and Event Support:


	Prepare meeting areas before and after internal and external meetings.
	Support toolbox talks or site briefings with attendance sheets and setups.


Support to Staff &amp; Basic Technical Assistance (As Required):


	Provide general assistance to site staff with non-computer-based tasks, such as organizing physical files if applicable.
	Under GM&#39;s direction, assist with simple technical tasks such as basic measurements, headcounts, or site photo documentation.


Equipment and Utilities Monitoring (Site Office):


	Check basic office equipment (e.g., printer, water dispenser, etc) for any obvious issues.
	Report malfunctions or irregularities to the GM immediately.


Confidentiality &amp; Professional Conduct:


	Handle all company and client information with discretion.
	Uphold Popville&#39;s professional image through punctuality, neatness, and adherence to safety and confidentiality policies.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 1 - 5 years of experience.


Salary

Site Office Assistant Job at Popville Luxury Homes




        
    

        
        Popville Luxury Homes is a fully integrated real estate development and management company headquartered in Abuja, delivering a new standard of intelligent luxury living. We create architecturally refined residences where advanced smart technology, timeless design, and uncompromising security converge. Inspired by the power, grace, and individuality of the world’s most iconic horse breeds, our collections represent freedom, sophistication, and enduring value. Each Popville residence is thoughtfully engineered to enhance comfort, efficiency, and long-term investment performance. At Popville, we don’t simply build homes—we develop future-ready assets designed for discerning homeowners and forward-thinking investors.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Office Assistant

Job Location: Wuse, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Site Office Assistant at Popville Luxury Homes, you will ensure the site office is kept clean, organized, and running smoothly.
	You will assist staff and visitors with day-to-day tasks, making sure the site environment is safe, welcoming, and efficient. When required, you will also provide basic technical support under supervision. Your role directly supports Popville's operational excellence on project sites.


Key Responsibilities
Site Office Cleanliness and Readiness (Daily):


	Perform daily cleaning of the site office, reception/induction area, meeting container, restrooms, and kitchenette to ensure a consistently presentable and hygienic environment.
	Keep common areas tidy and ensure essential items (e.g., soap, paper towels, drinking water) are replenished.
	Empty trash bins and ensure all areas are thoroughly cleaned at the end of each workday.
	Report any facility or equipment issues promptly to the GM.


Reception and Communication Support:


	Welcome site visitors, vendors, and subcontractors, guiding them appropriately and ensuring they sign the site register.
	Take clear, accurate messages for staff and relay them promptly.
	Assist in posting and updating notices, memos, and site information boards as directed by the GM.


Site Supply Management:


	Monitor and maintain stock of office consumables (stationery, cleaning materials, refreshments) and report shortages to Admin support.
	Assist in receiving and organizing deliveries at the site office.
	Support in tracking PPE availability and distribution when required.


Document Handling & Organization (Physical):


	Help distribute, file, and organize physical documents such as delivery notes, site registers, or attendance sheets.
	Facilitate photocopying/printing tasks using site office equipment.


Meeting and Event Support:


	Prepare meeting areas before and after internal and external meetings.
	Support toolbox talks or site briefings with attendance sheets and setups.


Support to Staff & Basic Technical Assistance (As Required):


	Provide general assistance to site staff with non-computer-based tasks, such as organizing physical files if applicable.
	Under GM's direction, assist with simple technical tasks such as basic measurements, headcounts, or site photo documentation.


Equipment and Utilities Monitoring (Site Office):


	Check basic office equipment (e.g., printer, water dispenser, etc) for any obvious issues.
	Report malfunctions or irregularities to the GM immediately.


Confidentiality & Professional Conduct:


	Handle all company and client information with discretion.
	Uphold Popville's professional image through punctuality, neatness, and adherence to safety and confidentiality policies.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 1 - 5 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Hotel Chef",
  "description": "Established in 2009, Efezi Southsea Nigeria Limited is a hospitality consultancy firm specializing in providing expert services to small and medium-sized hotels.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Chef

Job Location:&nbsp;Aba, Abia

Summary


	The role of a chef goes far beyond just cooking&mdash;it involves managing the kitchen, ensuring food quality, and maintaining high standards of hygiene and efficiency.


Responsibilties


	Food Preparation and Cooking: A chef is responsible for preparing and cooking meals according to the menu, ensuring taste, presentation, and portion sizes meet the required standards.
	Menu Planning: Chefs often design menus, introduce new dishes, and ensure variety while considering cost, seasonality, and customer preferences.
	Kitchen Management: They supervise kitchen staff (cooks, assistants, stewards), assign duties, and ensure smooth daily operations in the kitchen.
	Quality Control: A chef ensures that all food leaving the kitchen is of high quality, safe to eat, and properly presented. This includes checking ingredients and finished dishes.
	Food Safety and Hygiene: Maintaining cleanliness is critical. Chefs ensure compliance with food safety standards to prevent contamination and health risks.
	Inventory and Cost Control: They monitor stock levels, order supplies, reduce waste, and control food costs to help the business stay profitable.
	Training and Supervision: Chefs train junior staff, improve their skills, and maintain discipline in the kitchen.
	Customer Satisfaction: In some settings, chefs interact with customers, handle special requests, and ensure a positive dining experience.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;efezisouthsea2000@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Hotel Chef Job at Efezi Southsea Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Established in 2009, Efezi Southsea Nigeria Limited is a hospitality consultancy firm specializing in providing expert services to small and medium-sized hotels.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Chef

Job Location: Aba, Abia

Summary


	The role of a chef goes far beyond just cooking—it involves managing the kitchen, ensuring food quality, and maintaining high standards of hygiene and efficiency.


Responsibilties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Food Preparation and Cooking: A chef is responsible for preparing and cooking meals according to the menu, ensuring taste, presentation, and portion sizes meet the required standards.
	Menu Planning: Chefs often design menus, introduce new dishes, and ensure variety while considering cost, seasonality, and customer preferences.
	Kitchen Management: They supervise kitchen staff (cooks, assistants, stewards), assign duties, and ensure smooth daily operations in the kitchen.
	Quality Control: A chef ensures that all food leaving the kitchen is of high quality, safe to eat, and properly presented. This includes checking ingredients and finished dishes.
	Food Safety and Hygiene: Maintaining cleanliness is critical. Chefs ensure compliance with food safety standards to prevent contamination and health risks.
	Inventory and Cost Control: They monitor stock levels, order supplies, reduce waste, and control food costs to help the business stay profitable.
	Training and Supervision: Chefs train junior staff, improve their skills, and maintain discipline in the kitchen.
	Customer Satisfaction: In some settings, chefs interact with customers, handle special requests, and ensure a positive dining experience.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Drone Pilot",
  "description": "Diamond Shine Nigeria Limited is the number 1 cleaning company in Abuja. With 12 years of expertise in janitorial cleaning, waste management, fumigation etc, we have been positioned as your one-stop shop for everything cleaning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Drone Pilot

Job Location:&nbsp;Utako, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description
We are seeking a skilled and reliable Drone Pilot to join our team for cleaning services. The successful candidate will operate drones equipped with cleaning equipment to perform various cleaning tasks, such as:


	High-pressure washing of buildings and structures
	Window cleaning
	Roof cleaning
	Facade cleaning
	Other cleaning tasks


Responsibilities


	Operate drones safely and efficiently
	Plan and execute cleaning missions
	Ensure quality control and attention to detail
	Maintain drone equipment and cleaning tools
	Work at heights and in various weather conditions
	Collaborate with team members to ensure successful project execution.


Requirements


	Experience in drone operation
	Knowledge of cleaning techniques and equipment
	Ability to work at heights and in confined spaces
	Strong attention to detail and quality control
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Humanresource@diamondshine.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Drone Pilot Job at Diamond Shine Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Diamond Shine Nigeria Limited is the number 1 cleaning company in Abuja. With 12 years of expertise in janitorial cleaning, waste management, fumigation etc, we have been positioned as your one-stop shop for everything cleaning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Drone Pilot

Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description
We are seeking a skilled and reliable Drone Pilot to join our team for cleaning services. The successful candidate will operate drones equipped with cleaning equipment to perform various cleaning tasks, such as:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	High-pressure washing of buildings and structures
	Window cleaning
	Roof cleaning
	Facade cleaning
	Other cleaning tasks


Responsibilities


	Operate drones safely and efficiently
	Plan and execute cleaning missions
	Ensure quality control and attention to detail
	Maintain drone equipment and cleaning tools
	Work at heights and in various weather conditions
	Collaborate with team members to ensure successful project execution.


Requirements


	Experience in drone operation
	Knowledge of cleaning techniques and equipment
	Ability to work at heights and in confined spaces
	Strong attention to detail and quality control
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
